summary: No audio details are given, but reviewers enthusiastically praise the photographs from this sold‑out June 28 1985 show.
review: The available reviews focus entirely on the high‑quality photos that capture the atmosphere of a sold‑out, rainy concert, with fans noting they could still hear the music from outside the fence. There is no commentary on the musical performance or recording quality itself.

ai_rating.rationale: Reviews contain no information about the audio performance or recording, only positive remarks about photographs; therefore a moderate rating with low confidence is assigned.

recording_quality.technical_notes: No audio‑related comments; reviewers discuss only visual material and mention hearing the music fine from outside the venue.
